channel.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization Weekly Updates RSS Feed
channel.description: Track daily updates of more than 500 awesome projects, including selfhosted, rust, javascript, swift, python, react, vue, free for dev, flutter, go etc.

item.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization Aug 9th - Aug 15th, 2021
item.description:
Books

  • Web Audio API by Boris Smus

item.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization Mar 1st - Mar 7th, 2021
item.description:
Libraries Visualization

  • Muser - Using machine learning to enhance music visualization in the browser.

item.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization Aug 10th - Aug 16th, 2020
item.description:
Downloads

  • Cavastars2.8k - A cross-platform terminal visualizer.

    • Libraries Visualization

  • Cavastars2.8k - A cross-platform terminal visualizer.

item.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization Jul 6th - Jul 12th, 2020
item.description:
Libraries Audio

  • standardized-audio-contextstars454 - A cross-browser implementation of the AudioContext which aims to closely follow the standard.
  • web-audio-beat-detectorstars428 - A beat detection utility which is using the Web Audio API.
  • meydastars1.2k - Audio feature extraction for JavaScript.

item.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization Jun 15th - Jun 21st, 2020
item.description:
Experiments

  • p5.js Audio Visualizer - A powerful, beat- and amplitude-responsive audio visualizer created with p5.soundstars748, on an HTML5 Canvas by Amanda Yeh.

item.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization Jun 1st - Jun 7th, 2020
item.description:
Experiments

  • YouTube Musical Spectrumstars139 - A browser extension that offers audio visualization on your YouTube page with nice musical notes.

item.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization Jan 13th - Jan 19th, 2020
item.description:
Experiments

  • audioMotion - High-resolution real-time audio spectrum analyzer and full-featured music player written in JavaScript. Includes binaries for Windows, Linux and macOS.

    • Libraries Visualization

  • audioMotion-analyzer - High-resolution real-time audio spectrum analyzer JS module with no dependencies.

item.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization Nov 4th - Nov 10th, 2019
item.description:
Experiments

  • Just Dance - A 3D Audio Visualization made with BabylonJS & 2D Perlin Noise.
  • Audible Visuals - Collection of visualizers derived from the Archimedean spiral by Sonia Boller.

    • Libraries Audio

  • audiostars137 - Generic Go package designed to define a common interface to analyze and/or process audio data
  • wavstars193 - Battle tested Wav decoder/encoder

    • Tutorials

  • Visualizing sound in Go with SDL

item.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization Jun 24th - Jun 30th, 2019
item.description:
Libraries Audio

  • Aubio - C library for realtime audio labeling with bindings for Python and PD, support for ofx and Vamp.

    • Downloads

  • How to Make Electronic Music Freebies

item.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization Jan 21st - Jan 27th, 2019
item.description:
Experiments

  • React Player - A complete Audio Visualisation player with ReactJS.
  • CPPN-based Visualizer - Applying compositional pattern-producing networks to generate interesting visuals from audio data.

    • Libraries Visualization

  • Slangstars1.1k - An audio programming language built in JS

item.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization Oct 22nd - Oct 28th, 2018
item.description:
Experiments

  • Audio Visualizerstars22 - An interesting web audio visualizer built with Pixi.js.

item.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization Jul 23rd - Jul 29th, 2018
item.description:
Downloads

  • Soundwhich

item.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization Jul 16th - Jul 22nd, 2018
item.description:
Libraries Visualization

  • Circular Audio Wavestars187 - A JS library for audio visualization in circular wave using Web Audio API and ECharts

item.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization May 21st - May 27th, 2018
item.description:
Libraries Visualization

  • wavebellstars41 - A javascript voice recorder with realtime waveform, using web microphone

item.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization Apr 23rd - Apr 29th, 2018
item.description:
People to Follow

  • Aaron Koblin - Artist, designer, programmer, and entrepreneur specializing in data and digital technologies.

    • Tutorials

  • Recreating legendary 8-bit games music with Web Audio API

item.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization Mar 5th - Mar 11th, 2018
item.description:
Tutorials

  • Creative Audio Visualizers

item.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization Dec 18th - Dec 24th, 2017
item.description:
Experiments

  • Weekly Music Visualizations Weekly music visualization experiments built with Three.js and p5.js by Suraya Shivji.

item.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization Dec 11th - Dec 17th, 2017
item.description:
Experiments

  • Andantino Listen some notes and try to find same notes on the keyboard.
  • ShowCQTBar - Audio spectrum visualization with musical scale.

item.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization Oct 9th - Oct 15th, 2017
item.description:
Libraries Visualization

  • Vuo — A realtime visual programming language for interactive media.

item.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization Sep 25th - Oct 1st, 2017
item.description:
Libraries Visualization

  • wavesurfer.js - A customizable audio waveform visualization, built on top of Web Audio API and HTML5 Canvas

    • Experiments

  • HTML5 Audio Visualizer Video Maker Pick your music, background image, customize the visualizer the way you want it, and have the visualizer be recorded all right in your web browser.
  • 3d Particles Music Visualiser Music visualiser done in Three.js by Richard Tan

item.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization Jun 12th - Jun 18th, 2017
item.description:
Experiments

  • Finding Love - fully interactive, Virtual Reality story that transforms emotions into art.
  • M A I L M A N Interactive music video by Bruno Imbrizi for a song called Mailman by Soundgarden.

item.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization Mar 13th - Mar 19th, 2017
item.description:
Experiments

  • Vissonance A collection of audio visualizers built in THREE.js.

item.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization Feb 20th - Feb 26th, 2017
item.description:
Experiments

  • Moire - A Web Audio / WebGL visualisation.

item.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization Jan 30th - Feb 5th, 2017
item.description:
Experiments

  • ClubberToy Several shadertoys, rewired with clubber, bundled as a vj app.
  • Mubert - World's first online music composer

    • Experiments on Codepen

  • Clubberize yin yang example - An example using the clubberize helper to easily integrate clubber.js in javascript apps.

    • Libraries Visualization

  • Clubber.jsstars343 - Application of music theory in audio reactive visualizations.

    • People to Follow

  • Yannis Gravezas - A creative coder with several projects featured in chrome experiments, fwa and elsewhere.

item.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization Jan 23rd - Jan 29th, 2017
item.description:
Experiments

  • Tangled - Audio-visual release by Berlin based netlabel Yarn Audio, visuals made in cables. Drag to rotate, scroll to zoom.

item.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization Jan 2nd - Jan 8th, 2017
item.description:
Experiments

  • Polyrhythm - An interactive exploration of polyrythmic rhythms.

    • Videos

  • Paul Adenot: Elements of Dance Music - JSConf.Asia 2015
  • 8-bit Music Theory

item.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization Dec 19th - Dec 25th, 2016
item.description:
Experiments

  • Musical Interactions - Some experimental ideas for playful musical interactions.

item.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization Nov 28th - Dec 4th, 2016
item.description:
Experiments

  • Dancing Torus - Dancing Torus is a WebGL Audio Reactive experience. Choose your favourite song on Soundcloud and start dancing!

item.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization Nov 21st - Nov 27th, 2016
item.description:
Libraries Audio

  • waveform-data - Audio Waveform Data Manipulation API – resample, offset and segment waveform data in JavaScript.
  • audiowaveformstars1.5k - C++ program to generate waveform data and render waveform images from audio files.

    • Libraries Visualization

  • Peaks.js - Modular client-side JavaScript component designed for the display of and interaction with audio waveform material in the browser.

item.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization Nov 14th - Nov 20th, 2016
item.description:
Experiments

  • Beat - Beat is a HTML5 audio/canvas experiment inspired by Propellerheads Figure iOS App.

item.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization Oct 31st - Nov 6th, 2016
item.description:
Experiments

  • Popcorn - Little audio-reactive sketch by Hugh Kennedy.

item.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization Oct 17th - Oct 23rd, 2016
item.description:
Experiments

  • VR Ondes Martenotstars5 - A playable rendition of the Ondes Martenot in Virtual Reality.

item.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization Aug 29th - Sep 4th, 2016
item.description:
Experiments

  • Braille Face: Kōya - Navigate a unique interactive environment in your browser while listening to Kōya, the debut album from Melbourne musician Braille Face.
  • Here Comes The Sun - A visual representation of The Beatles' song "Here Comes The Sun" dynamically generated by an algorithm developed with Processing and Processing.js. By Marcio Ribeiro.
  • DJi - Clean music visualizer from SoundCloud or self uploaded.

    • Libraries Audio

  • Octavianstars169 - Utilities for reasoning about musical notes, frequencies, and intervals

item.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization Aug 15th - Aug 21st, 2016
item.description:
Experiments

  • Arkade London - Arkade London is a pure personal and experimental webVJ fan art.

item.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization Jul 25th - Jul 31st, 2016
item.description:
Tutorials

  • Javascript Systems Music - Learning Web Audio by Recreating The Works of Steve Reich and Brian Eno

item.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization Jul 18th - Jul 24th, 2016
item.description:
Experiments

  • PartyMode - An experimental music visualizer using d3.js and the web audio api.

    • People to Follow

  • Mat Preziotte - Absurd music visualizations and generative art.

item.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization Jun 27th - Jul 3rd, 2016
item.description:
Libraries Audio

  • audio-renderstars40 - A pass-through audio stream, providing structure for rendering stream audio data.

item.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization Jun 13th - Jun 19th, 2016
item.description:
Experiments

  • Mmorph - An adventure into new ways of delivering interactive music in the browser and beyond.
  • Loop Waveform Visualizer - WebGL Visualizer for Screw Base by Beytah.
  • Triangles - An experiment using triangles in Canvas.

    • Experiments on Codepen

  • P5 Audio Tests 33 - Audio visualization using p5.js 3D elements and Soundcloud API
  • P5 Audio Tests 27 - Audio visualization using p5.js 3D elements and Soundcloud API
  • CircleLineNERDDISCO - Audio visualization with amazing analyser by Tim Pietrusky.

item.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization Jun 6th - Jun 12th, 2016
item.description:
Experiments

  • Touchpianist - play a piano and look all animations along the screen.

item.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization May 23rd - May 29th, 2016
item.description:
Experiments

  • Scribble Audio - Draw loops of sound with this web synthesizer.

item.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization May 16th - May 22nd, 2016
item.description:
Experiments

  • Restless Earth - Audio visualization for "Restless Earth".

item.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization May 9th - May 15th, 2016
item.description:
Experiments

  • D159 - Audio visualization for "gloom" shown at NVScene 2015 by Simo Santavirta.
  • Happy Monday - Musical experiment using THREE.MeshLine by David Ronai.
  • Audiograph - Amazing audio visualization made by Matt DesLauriers.

    • Downloads

  • Motion Sound

item.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization May 2nd - May 8th, 2016
item.description:
Experiments

  • Chrome Music Lab - Play with simple experiments and explore how music works.
  • Glowsynth - just amazing! - Play with your mouse, Qwerty keyboad, or MIDI keyboard and watch as the lights dance to your music.
  • Garbage Collector - Audio visualization experiment made with Three.js and some post-processing.

    • Libraries Visualization

  • Processing - An open source programming language and integrated development environment built for the electronic arts, new media art, and visual design communities.

item.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization Apr 25th - May 1st, 2016
item.description:
Experiments

  • TRIF - GIF-based online radio visualization using webaudio API and raw CSS

item.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization Apr 18th - Apr 24th, 2016
item.description:
Experiments

  • Adventure Machine - Campaign for Madeon's "Adventure" album.
  • BBNG - WebGL Visualizer for "Confessions" (feat. Leland Whitty) by BADBADNOTGOOD.
  • Born in the Echoes - Campaign for The Chemical Brothers' "Born in the Echoes" album.
  • DENNIS - An interactive and audio responsive music video for "Dennis" by popcorn_10's.
  • George & Jonathan III - Campaign for George & Jonathan's "III" album.
  • Lantern - WebGL Visualizer for "Lantern" by SBTRKT.
  • Nero - WebGL Visualizer for "In The Way" by Nero.
  • Pareidolia - WebGL Visualizer for "Szerencsétlen" by Venetian Snares.
  • Yume - Campaign for Helios' "Yume" album.
  • Word Problems - WebGL Visualizer for "Word Problems" by Harmonic 313.
  • Glitch - An algorithmic synthesizer to make music from math.
  • 105 Birthday Clara Rockmore - A Doodle for the Birthday of Clara Rockmore.
  • Tonalhub - Create music from your github repository by Alejandro Mantecon Guillen.
  • Play a cornet to Donald Trump - A funny site to play a cornet to Donald Trump by Animal Agency.
  • Bohemian Rhapsichord - A web app that turns the song Bohemian Rhapsody into a musical instrument by Paul Lamere.
  • Moogfest Substrate - Experimental site to Moogfest.
  • Fluctus - Experimental 3D Audio Visualizer by Jordan Machado.
  • Lines - Visualising Joy Division album cover as a music spectrum by Silvio Paganini.
  • Spins - Audio Visualizer rendering Waveforms in Polar Coordinates by Matt DesLauriers.
  • Silk - 3D Audio Visualizer by Matt DesLauriers.
  • Wave - 3D Audio Visualizer by Matt DesLauriers.
  • Binaural - Experiment using Binaural and Reverb audio effects by Matt DesLauriers.
  • Beatgrid - Experiment using Audio Beat Detection by Matt DesLauriers.
  • Party - 2D Audio Visualizer by Matt DesLauriers.
  • Fireworks with WebGL - Sound driven fireworks by Ondřej Žára.
  • Scrollsound - Scrolling as a method of interaction with audio on the web by Ehsan Ziya.
  • Experiment #8 - Music Experiment by Bruno Imbrizi.
  • Draw and Music - Campaign for Rugs new album by Sam Greens.
  • Flame Gradient - Audio visualizer built with HTML5 web audio API by rickycodes.
  • 3D Grid - Audio visualizer built with HTML5 web audio API by rickycodes.
  • obsidian - 3D Audio Visualization made by the creator of Three.js.

    • Experiments on Codepen

  • Soundcloud Vinyl Search - An amazing experiment creating a realistic Vinyl player using DrawSVG and GSAP by Chris Gannon.
  • Gooey Effect Audio - Upload your mp3 and visualize the song with this crazy effect by Jeremy Karlsson.
  • Storytelling with Html5 + CSS3 - A great example of how to use music to create a Storytelling by Rachel Nabors.
  • Step sequencer - Create music with this sequencer by Joe Harry.
  • SVG Animated Drum Kit - Play an amazing Drum made with SVG and realistic sounds by @iamjoshellis.
  • SVG Animated Guitar - Play an amazing Guitar made with SVG and realistic sounds by @iamjoshellis.
  • Audio Visualizer - Abstract Audio Visualizer using Three.js by Francesco Trillini
  • Awesome Audio Player - Radial Audio Player constructed by lines of frequency and amplitude by Alex Permyakov
  • Wireframes - Wireframe WebGL Animation with Three.js by Patrick Heng
  • CSS Audio Visualizer - Using audio frequency data from a hidden video to apply CSS scaling by Neil McCallion.
  • WebGL Soundcloud Visualizer using Three.js - ThreeJS/WebGL Soundcloud player/visualizer based on HTML5 AudioContext API by Luigi Mannoni.
  • Oscilator - Testing the oscillator node from HTML5 audio API by Anej Gorkič.
  • Cubes Audio Visualizer - 10th contribution for codevember 2015 by Patrick Heng.

    • Libraries Audio

  • Beeplay.js - Write a song In JavaScript.

    • Libraries Visualization

  • The Forcestars238 - Live coded shader editing with audio input.
  • Hylogenstars470 - Purely functional language embedded in Haskell for expressive live coding of fragment shaders (with audio input).

    • People to Follow

  • Joshua Davis - An American designer, technologist, author and artist in new media.
  • Robert Hodgin - A creative coder living in Brooklyn. Co-creator of the Cinder C++.
  • Seb Lee-Delisle - An award-winning digital artist and speaker.
  • Raven Kwok - A visual artist, animator and creative programmer.
  • Jason Sigal - Creative Coder in residence at NYU's and creator of web audio library for p5.js.
  • Shawn Lawson - An experiential media artist creating the computational sublime.
  • Matt DesLauriers - Creative coder at Jam 3.
  • Patrick Heng - Creative front-end developer. Studied at Hetic and Gobelins and works at Grouek.
  • Chris Wilson - Open Web Guy, formerly of Microsoft and now working as a Developer Advocate at Google.

item.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization Apr 11th - Apr 17th, 2016
item.description:
Experiments

  • Luis Henrique Bizarro Portfolio - Portfolio with experiments using Three.JS and GSLS.
  • Goy Goy - A multiplayer Chrome Experiment made with HTML5 Canvas, socket.io and audiolet.js.
  • OMM - An interactive audio visual experience exploring creativity.
  • Soundviz - 5 different sound visualization effects with Leap Motion interactivity.
  • Splice - A realtime interactive music visualizer using time-code data from Splice's upcoming visualizer API.
  • Typatone - Make music while you write.
  • Audio Cloud - A reactive particle system based on audio analysis of Fast Fourier Transform spectrum.
  • Floraldrift - Procedurally generated music and visuals.
  • Music Cube - A Chrome Experiment that combines the Roland TR-808 Drum Machine with the Rubik's Cube.
  • Music Game - ECHO - A challenging musical puzzle game.
  • Patatap - A portable animation and sound kit.
  • Plink - Awesome Multiplayer Game - A multiplayer music experience.
  • Simon Says - Game - A free memory game in your browser.
  • Soundcloud Visualizer - A Canvas and Web Audio Experiment.
  • CSS Visualizer - Music Visualizers that are made entirely using DOM elements and CSS3.
  • Kandinski Experiment - Music Visualizations inspired in Kandinsky.
  • Visual Music Trailer - Live audio visual performance ideas.

    • Libraries Audio

  • web-audio-analyserstars206 - A thin wrapper around the Web Audio API that takes an
  • web-audio-playerstars243 - A cross-browser Web Audio player.
  • web-media-playbackstars8 - Retrieve playback and buffering information about audio or video playing in the browser.
  • Pizzicato.js - Simplify the way you create and manipulate sounds via the Web Audio API.
  • ThreeAudio.jsstars517 - Helps you create music visualizations in Three.js or tQuery.
  • MIDI.jsstars3.5k - Making life easy to create a MIDI-app on the web.
  • Beep.jsstars1.3k - A JavaScript toolkit for building browser-based synthesizers.
  • p5.soundstars748 - Brings the Processing approach to Web Audio and p5.js.
  • Audiolet - A JavaScript library for real-time audio synthesis and composition.
  • coffee-collider - A language for real time audio synthesis and algorithmic composition in HTML5.

    • Libraries Visualization

  • p5.js - A JavaScript library for creating graphic and interactive experiences, based on the core principles of Processing.
  • Pixi.jsstars37.7k - A fast lightweight 2D library that works across all devices. The Pixi renderer allows everyone to enjoy the power of hardware acceleration without prior knowledge of WebGL.
  • sketch.js - Let's you get straight to the fun parts of creative coding, without ever having to worry about shims or boilerplate code.
  • three.js - Three.js is a library that makes WebGL easy to use.
  • Two.js - A two-dimensional drawing API geared towards modern web browsers. It is renderer agnostic enabling the same API to draw in multiple contexts: SVG, Canvas, and WebGL.
  • BabylonJS - A complete JavaScript framework for building 3D games with HTML5, WebGL and Web Audio.
  • Web Audio Extensionstars180 - A Chrome extension to play with Web Audio.
  • Cinder - A community-developed, free and open source library for professional-quality creative coding in C++.
  • HYPE_processing - Collection of Processing classes that performs heavy lifting tasks while using a minimal amount of code writing.

    • Tutorials

  • Kadenze - Courses about Sound and Creative Process

item.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization Mar 28th - Apr 3rd, 2016
item.description:
Videos

  • Mathieu 'p01' Henri: Making Realtime Audio-Visuals - JSConf.Asia 2015

item.title: willianjusten/awesome-audio-visualization Mar 21st - Mar 27th, 2016
item.description:
Downloads

  • Beeple's resource (inspirational C4D "open source" files)
  • Freesound
  • Audio Jungle
  • Six Bit Deep
  • Samplephonics - Free Stuff
  • Wave Alchemy
  • Audio Animals
  • Bed Room Producers Blog
  • Free Music Archive
  • Music Radar

    • Tutorials

  • MDN - Basic concepts behind Web Audio API
  • Understanding AudioParams: Precision control of web audio nodes
  • Making An Interactive Music Video With WebGL
  • Exploring the web audio api with d3
  • Getting Started with Web Audio API
  • 14 essential JavaScript audio libraries for web developers
  • Learning Web Audio API
  • Fun with Web Audio API
  • The Audio Processing Dog House
  • Web Audio School
  • Audio visualisation with the web audio api
  • Make Your Browser Dance
  • Audio Visualization with Web Audio and Three.js
  • Applying Web Audio API with the HTML5 Canvas Element - Part I
  • Applying Web Audio API with the HTML5 Canvas Element - Part II
  • Real-time analysis of streaming audio data with Web Audio API
  • Syncing CSS Animations with HTML5 Audio

    • Videos

  • Matt McKegg: I Play The JavaScript - JSConf.Asia 2015
  • Chris Lowis: A Brief History of Synthesis with the Web Audio API
  • Introducing the Web Audio API
  • CorkDev.IO - HTML 5 Web Audio API
  • Steve Kinney: Building a musical instrument with the Web Audio API | JSConf US 2015
  • Making the Web Rock: The Web Audio API
  • Jordan Santell: Signal Processing with the Web Audio API - JSConf2014
  • Making waves using the Web Audio API
  • Stuart Memo: JavaScript is the new Punk Rock
  • Jan Krutisch: JavaScript Patterns For Contemporary Dance Music -- JSConf EU 2013
  • Charlie Roberts: Gibbering at Algoraves - JS in Live Audiovisual Performances - JSConf.Asia 2014
  • Lauren McCarthy: Learning while making p5js
  • Interactive Music with Tone.js
  • Web Audio API vs Native: Closing the Gap
  • BRAID: A Web Audio Instrument Builder with Embedded Code Blocks
  • Web Audio Tools
  • HTML5DevConf: Jordan Santell, "Browser Dance Party: Visualizing Audio with the Web Audio API"
  • Praveen Kumar - MIDI.js
